source:
"use client"; import React from "react"; import { MousePointer2, Eye, RefreshCw, TrendingUp, Download, Bell } from "lucide-react"; import StatCard from "@/components/admin/StatCard"; import { ResponsiveContainer, LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, BarChart, Bar, Cell, PieChart, Pie } from "recharts"; const analyticsTrendData = [ { name: "Jan 1", clicks: 320, views: 500, conversions: 120 }, { name: "Jan 2", clicks: 250, views: 400, conversions: 80 }, { name: "Jan 3", clicks: 280, views: 450, conversions: 100 }, { name: "Jan 4", clicks: 450, views: 650, conversions: 180 }, { name: "Jan 5", clicks: 380, views: 550, conversions: 150 }, { name: "Jan 6", clicks: 220, views: 350, conversions: 90 }, { name: "Jan 7", clicks: 350, views: 510, conversions: 130 }, ]; const trafficSourceData = [ { name: 'Google', value: 28, fill: '#EA4335' }, { name: 'Direct', value: 35, fill: '#34A853' }, { name: 'Social Media', value: 22, fill: '#FBBC05' }, { name: 'Email', value: 10, fill: '#4285F4' }, { name: 'Referral', value: 5, fill: '#A855F7' }, ]; export default function AnalyticsPage() { return (
{/* Header Section */}

Analytics & Tracking

Monitor platform performance and conversions

{/* Stats Grid */}
{/* Main Trends Chart */}

Clicks & Conversions Trend

Track clicks, views, and conversions over time

{/* Bottom Grid */}
{/* Category Performance */}

Category Performance

{/* Bar chart placeholder */} [Bar Chart: Clicks vs Conversions per Category]
{/* Traffic Sources */}

Traffic Sources

{trafficSourceData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{trafficSourceData.map((item) => (
{item.name}
{item.value}%
))}
); }

source:
"use client"; import React from "react"; import { History, RotateCcw, Trash, Info, Download, Bell, } from "lucide-react"; import { useNotification } from "@/context/NotificationContext"; const deletedDealsData = [ { id: 1, title: "Samsung Galaxy", price: "₦450,000", merchant: "TechHub", category: "Electronics", clicks: "5,897", deletedDate: "2 days ago", deletedBy: "Admin User" }, { id: 2, title: "Nike Air Max 270", price: "₦450,000", merchant: "TechHub", category: "Phones", clicks: "5,897", deletedDate: "2 days ago", deletedBy: "System" }, { id: 3, title: "Nike Air Max 270", price: "₦85,000", merchant: "SportsWorld", category: "Fashion", clicks: "1,000", deletedDate: "5 days ago", deletedBy: "Admin User" }, ]; export default function DeletedDealsPage() { const { showNotification } = useNotification(); const hasDeals = deletedDealsData.length > 0; const handleRestore = (title: string) => { showNotification("success", `Deal "${title}" restored successfully`); }; const handleRestoreAll = () => { showNotification("success", "All deals restored successfully"); }; const handleDeleteForever = (title: string) => { showNotification("warning", `Deal "${title}" permanently deleted`); }; const handleEmptyTrash = () => { showNotification("warning", "Trash emptied successfully"); }; return (
{/* Header Section */}

Deleted Deals

{/* Main Content Card */}

Deleted Deals

Manage soft-deleted deals. Items will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

{hasDeals && (
)}
{/* Info Alert */}

Items in trash will be permanently deleted after 30 days

You can restore deals before they are permanently removed from the system.

{!hasDeals ? (

No deleted deals

When you delete deals, they'll appear here for 30 days before being permanently removed.

) : (
{deletedDealsData.map((deal) => ( ))}
Deal Title Price Merchant Category Clicks Deleted Date Deleted By Actions
{deal.title} {deal.price} {deal.merchant} {deal.category} {deal.clicks} {deal.deletedDate} {deal.deletedBy}
)}
); }

Performance Reports

In-depth analytics and performance breakdowns

No Reports Generated

Click the button above to generate a custom performance report for your team.

Archive Ready

Historical data from February is now available in the archive section.

Recent Reports

Marketer Performance Summary - Week {i}

Generated: March {i}, 2026 • 2.4 MB

))}
); }

"use client"; import { useSession, signOut } from "next-auth/react"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; import { useEffect } from "react"; import Link from "next/link"; export default function Dashboard() { const { data: session, status } = useSession(); const router = useRouter(); useEffect(() => { if (status === "unauthenticated") { router.push("/login"); } }, [status, router]); if (status === "loading") { return (
); } return (
{/* Navbar */}
| Dashboard

{session?.user?.name}

{session?.user?.email}

{/* Main Content */}
{/* Welcome Card */}

Welcome back, {session?.user?.name?.split(' ')[0]}! 👋

Here's what's happening with your account today.

{/* Stats Cards */}

Total Orders

0

Wishlist Items

0

Messages

0

{/* Recent Activity Placeholder */}

Recent Activity

No recent activity to show.

{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

); }

source:
"use client"; import React from "react"; import { Upload, Plus } from "lucide-react"; export default function VerificationPage() { return (
{/* Account Verification */}

Account verification

Not verified

Help other users trust you by verifying your account.

Upload Image
{/* Phone Number */}

Phone Number

In review

Confirm your phone number so buyers and sellers can reach you.

{/* Email Address */}

Email Address

Verified

Secure your account and receive important updates.

); } function ChevronDownIcon() { return }

source:
"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; import Image from "next/image"; import { ChevronLeft, Eye, Save, Plus, X, ChevronDown, Upload } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useNotification } from "@/context/NotificationContext"; interface DealFormProps { initialData?: any; type: "add" | "edit"; } export default function DealForm({ initialData, type }: DealFormProps) { const { showNotification } = useNotification(); const [isFeatured, setIsFeatured] = useState(initialData?.isFeatured || false); const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState(initialData?.image || null); const handleImageUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (file) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onloadend = () => { setImagePreview(reader.result as string); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } }; const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); showNotification("success", type === "add" ? "Deal created successfully" : "Deal updated successfully"); }; return (
{/* Left Column: Forms */}
{/* Deal Details */}

Deal Details

Basic information about the deal

{/* Pricing & Merchant */}

Pricing & Merchant

Deal pricing and merchant information

₦
₦
{/* Image Upload */}

Deal Image

Upload a high-quality image of the product

{imagePreview ? (
) : ( )}
{/* Right Column: Controls & Stats */}
{/* Publish Controls */}

Publish Controls

Featured Deal

Show on homepage

Cancel
{/* Statistics */}

Status & Stats

Views {initialData?.stats?.views || 0}
Clicks {initialData?.stats?.clicks || 0}
Created {initialData?.createdAt || "Just now"}
); }
